_meta.about: Generic garment-colour presets for knockout_background(shirt=...). Approximate, representative values tuned for DTF background removal; brand-specific colour packs may follow. Reference only - no guarantee of exact garment match.
_meta.fields: hex=target colour; mode=knockout technique (subtract=color-to-alpha for dark garments where black=shirt-shows-through; hard=select+clear for light/solid); tolerance=match aggressiveness 0-1; note=caveats

black.note: Real black tees photograph ~#1c1c1c, not pure black.

heather_gray.note: Heather is a mottled 2-thread blend; wider tolerance, review the result.

red.note: Mid-tone: hard removal so reds in the art are not eaten.
